name: You May Be a Fool...but I Still Love You

issues.description: Trigger type is incorrect. Should be 'StartOfTurn' to check life count at turn start, not a generic 'Trigger'.
Missing condition to check 'If you have 3 or less Life cards'. Should include condition checking life total ≤ 3.
Action is completely wrong. Card prevents adding Life cards during turn, not a PowerBoost. Should use a restrictive effect or GiveKeyword with appropriate restriction logic, not offensive boost.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect for a turn-long restriction. Should be 'DuringYourTurn' since effect lasts 'during this turn'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have 3 or less Life cards, you cannot add Life cards to your hand using your own effects during this turn.
